content_body: A wonderful experience. We didn't leave the cabin except quick trips to the grocery store. The cleaning crew you have did an absolutely exceptional job. The house was above immaculate and I was highly impressed by her attention to details. I appreciate all of the hard work that is very apparent. I left it very clean simply because I saw how hard she worked all day on the cabin nearby. Two thumbs up for a overall relaxing experience. I didn't want to leave. We will be back with several more of our friends in the near future. Almost hate to let them know about the little “secret” though.
title: Didn't Want To Leave!
